User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Academia Exam Platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The email address of the user.

guardianEmail.description: The email address of the user's guardian.

role.description: The role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin).

Exam.title: Exam
Exam.description: Represents an exam in the Academia Exam Platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Exam entity.

description.description: A brief description of the exam.

startTime.description: The date and time when the exam starts.

endTime.description: The date and time when the exam ends.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents a question in an exam.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Question entity.

type.description: The type of question (e.g., multiple choice, short text, true/false).

options.description: Array of possible answers for multiple choice questions.

correctAnswer.description: The correct answer for the question.

StudentExam.title: StudentExam
StudentExam.description: Represents a student's completed exam attempt, storing their answers and results.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudentExam entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student (User). (Relationship: Student 1:N StudentExam)

examId.description: Reference to the Exam. (Relationship: Exam 1:N StudentExam)

score.description: The student's final score for this attempt.

maxScore.description: The maximum possible score for the exam.

percentage.description: The student's score as a percentage.

passed.description: Indicates whether the student passed the exam.

timeTaken.description: The time in seconds the student took to complete the exam.

attemptNumber.description: Which attempt number this result represents.

submittedAt.description: The timestamp when the exam was submitted.

answers.description: An array of the student's answers.

StudentAnswer.title: StudentAnswer
StudentAnswer.description: Represents a student's answer to a question in an exam.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudentAnswer entity.

answer.description: The student's answer to the question.

isCorrect.description: Indicates whether the student's answer is correct.

Sheet.title: Sheet
Sheet.description: Represents an assignment sheet given by a teacher.

title.description: The title of the assignment sheet.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the sheet was created.

deadline.description: The submission deadline for the sheet.

teacherId.description: The ID of the teacher who created the sheet.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: Represents a student's submission for an assignment sheet.

id.description: Unique identifier for the submission, usually studentId_sheetId.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp of when the work was submitted.

fileUrl.description: URL to an uploaded file for the submission.

grade.description: The numerical grade given by the teacher.

gradedAt.description: Timestamp of when the submission was graded.

sheetTitle.description: Denormalized title of the sheet for easy display.

sheetSubject.description: Denormalized subject of the sheet for easy display.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user data including optional guardian email. User documents are only accessible to the user themselves and admins.

/exams/{examId}.description: Stores exam data. Exams are owned by teachers, so access is limited to the creating teacher and admins. Includes denormalized 'teacherId' for authorization independence.

/exams/{examId}/questions/{questionId}.description: Stores questions for an exam. Only accessible to the teacher who owns the exam and admins. Includes denormalized 'examId' and 'teacherId' for authorization independence.

/studentExams/{studentExamId}.description: Stores a student's completed exam attempt. This collection is public for report generation.

/sheets/{sheetId}.description: Stores assignment sheets. Teachers can create/manage their own sheets. Students can read all sheets.

/submissions/{submissionId}.description: Stores student submissions for sheets. Students can create/read their own. Teachers can read all submissions for their sheets and update them with grades.
